title: Stelis imraei
intro: Stelis imraei is a species of orchid, specifically a type of epiphytic orchid that grows on other plants, known for its unique and delicate flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies for skin conditions and respiratory issues.
